title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
seoDescription: Free online Base64 encoder and decoder. Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to plain text instantly. Perfect for developers working with data encoding.
step1Desc: Type or paste your text in the input field.
step2Desc: Click Encode to convert text to Base64, or Decode to convert Base64 back to readable text.
step3Desc: Use the Copy button to copy the result, or Swap to make the output your new input.
faq1A: Base64 converts binary data to ASCII text using 64 characters. It is commonly used for transmitting data over text-based protocols.
faq2A: Yes, this tool handles UTF-8 text properly before encoding to Base64.
faq3A: Yes, Base64 encoding is fully reversible. Use the Decode button to recover the original text.
